user.name: Pranali
user.title: Junior Developer
user.bio: Passionate developer. Ready to learn and grow my technical career.

roadmap.title: Junior Developer
roadmap.description: Master foundational web applications, basic state management, database schemas, and clean code deployment.

roadmap.title: Mid-Level System Engineer
roadmap.description: Focus on backend performance, Docker containers, multi-service setups, caching strategies, and system reliability.

roadmap.title: Technical Lead
roadmap.description: Architect distributed backends, lead developer teams, coordinate product roadmap transitions, and design secure authentication gates.

roadmap.title: Senior Solutions Architect
roadmap.description: Provide enterprise-level global software architectures, multi-region database replication plans, AI model pipelines, and system security structures.

strengths: Good display of frontend and server logic.
growthAreas: Incorporate container orchestration tools like Kubernetes or AWS EKS.
Add caching systems to demonstrate distributed system knowledge.
resumeAnalysis.originalText:
ALEX MERCER
alex.mercer@gmail.com | (555) 019-2834
github.com/alexmercer

SUMMARY
Enthusiastic Junior Fullstack Developer with 2 years of experience crafting React applications and Node.js REST APIs. Eager to master large-scale architectures.

EXPERIENCE
Software Engineer - WebCorp (2024 - Present)
- Developed responsive features for e-commerce clients using React 18 and Tailwind CSS.
- Maintained backend endpoints written in Express, connecting them with SQL databases.
- Assisted in optimizing code performance and decreased main bundle sizes by 15%.
resumeAnalysis.suggestedRevision:
ALEX MERCER (Optimized)
- Orchestrated fullstack application upgrades, improving average load-times by 30% and modernizing REST endpoints.
- Implemented robust Docker containers and CI/CD pipelines to speed up feature deployments.
aiRecommendations: Quantify your accomplishments. Instead of 'built APIs', write 'built scalable Express APIs handling 5,000 requests per minute'.
Add core DevOps and Cloud automation technologies.
